name: gas-slack-bot-gemini
description: Google Apps Script Slack bot powered by Gemini for multimodal channel replies and file analysis

scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:json
scripts.check:json: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); ['appsscript.json', 'slack-app-manifest.json'].forEach((file) => JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'))); console.log('JSON manifests are valid.');"
